name: Bazarr+ Subtitles
description: Connect to a self-hosted Bazarr+ server to search and download subtitles across all configured providers via a single endpoint. Requires a Bazarr+ v2.2.0+ instance with the External Integration endpoint enabled.
overview: Fetch subtitles from a Bazarr+ instance via the OpenSubtitles-compatible REST endpoint

versions.changelog:
- Initial fork from jellyfin-plugin-opensubtitles
- Retargeted at Bazarr+ compat endpoint
- Independent reimplementation of OpenSubtitles REST protocol
